meta.hook: The case queue is read as a single risk-spine: each case is a fixed-width meter (track + fill + knob) on one 0-1 risk lane labelled by its exact numeral, so the descending bar-ends read the caseload as a gradient before any text.
themes: dark (forced single theme, by owner instruction)
meta.fonts_note: Font is a guess (no brand assets). Signature voice is the tabular-mono risk numerals, not the face.

color._severity_note: Severity is NOT colour-only: encoded by bar length + position on the risk lane + the numeral. Accent intensity is redundant. Accent <= ~10% of screen.

type.mono: "JetBrains Mono", "Cascadia Code", "SF Mono", ui-monospace, "DejaVu Sans Mono", monospace

motion.reduced_motion: static alternate — no auto-insert animation, no counter; values appear final
